productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Brown Formal Shoes
description: Style Note Take semi-formal dressing to the next level with these slip-on leather shoes from red tape. With comfort and style rolled into one, these shoes work great for people who love to take off and wear their shoes with ease. Product Details Full grain leather upper for maximum durability, breathability and style with a slip-on system for easy wear and removal Elastic inserts on the sides of the tongue for a snug, customised Fit Stitch detailing to enhance shoe life Curved and padded collar with a fabric inner for comfort Fabric inner lining for maximum breathability Padded fabric footbed with extra cushioning in the backfoot for all-day comfort TPU outsole with a stacked heel and patterned grooves Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
